phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ingresso principale del Duomo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee doh-VEH ling-GRES-soh prin-chee-PAH-leh del DWOH-moh pehr fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Si trova sul lato nord della piazza.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE TROH-vah SOOL LAH-toh NOHRD DEHL-lah pee-AHTS-tsah
likely_response.translation_en: It is located on the north side of the square.

responses.english: It is located on the north side of the square.
responses.phonetic: SEE TROH-vah SOOL LAH-toh NOHRD DEHL-lah pee-AHTS-tsah
responses.local: Si trova sul lato nord della piazza.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora apre la chiesa, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah AH-preh lah KYEH-zah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: Hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si prenota un tour dell'Etna, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KOH-meh see preh-NOH-tah oon toor del-LET-nah, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, è permesso fare fotografie dentro, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, eh per-MES-soh FAH-reh fo-toh-GRAH-fee-eh DEN-troh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Depends on the season, check there.

responses.english: Depends on the season, check there.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è un ascensore per la cupola, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh oon ah-shen-SOH-reh per lah KOO-poh-lah, per fah-VOH-reh
